summary_en: Belarus Creates Legal Framework for Bitcoin and Crypto Banks in New Decree

items.title_en: Customers are benefitting from the global stablecoin arms race — but that won’t last forever
items.title_ur: Customers are benefitting from the global stablecoin arms race — but that won’t last forever
summary_en: Customers are benefitting from the global stablecoin arms race — but that won’t last forever
It would be a mistake to see the incoming wave of aggressive APYs as the new baseline, according to Ron Tarter, CEO of MNEE.
This is merely the promotional phase of stablecoins.
